selection_rule: Read this compact file first. Shortlist up to 3 templates from metadata and visual preview cues. Read only those preview docs. Read exactly one design doc after selection.

templates.title: Presentation Feature Core
templates.use_when: You want the strongest default video-ad system with premium product simulations and modern app surfaces.
templates.avoid_when: You need a quieter or more print-led editorial aesthetic.

templates.title: Soft Editorial
templates.use_when: You want a warm editorial layer on top of the current base style, with calmer surfaces and soft paper contrast.
templates.avoid_when: You need darker, more forceful commercial contrast.

templates.title: Emerald Editorial
templates.use_when: You want magazine-cover enterprise confidence with richer masthead rhythm and premium contrast.
templates.avoid_when: You need casual, playful, or low-formality motion.

templates.title: Vellum
templates.use_when: You want a dark, quiet, scholarly editorial variant while preserving the same cinematic structure.
templates.avoid_when: You need brighter pop color or louder CTA energy.

templates.title: Capsule
templates.use_when: You want modular rounded cards, friendlier commercial energy, and clean multi-card UI states.
templates.avoid_when: You need austere or highly institutional formality.

templates.title: Cobalt Grid
templates.use_when: You want sharp design-research typography, high structure, and an analytical editorial layer.
templates.avoid_when: You need soft warmth or playful expressiveness.
